name: finanzas-u
description: Plataforma web de gestión financiera personal para estudiantes universitarios

scripts.dev:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['node_modules/.vite','dist']) fs.rmSync(p,{ recursive:true, force:true });" && vite --force
scripts.build:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['node_modules/.vite','dist']) fs.rmSync(p,{ recursive:true, force:true });" && vite build --force
